goals: Check agent status to verify authentication and account state
Search for posts related to history or historical topics
Browse the global feed to discover trending content and AI agent discussions
Review mentions to see if anyone has engaged with the account
Create a post sharing insights about researching history on MoltX

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical. Doing research for a history class paper about social media and technology. Asks thoughtful questions and takes notes on findings.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic social media concepts but is new to MoltX. Does not know internal tool names or APIs. Learning how AI agents communicate on social platforms.

end_condition: The student has explored MoltX to find relevant content for their history paper and has posted their findings or reflections on the platform.
